Dr. K. Raghavan

Managing Director & CEO

Biography

Over 35 years of global engineering experience leading mega EPC projects across Middle East and India. Specialized in refinery expansion, petroleum logistics and corporate leadership.

Key Expertise

  • EPC Management
  • Project Finance
  • Joint Ventures

Professional Experience

35+ Years in Oil & Gas and Power sectors
